actions.name: 调入出运明细数据
actions.caption: 调入出运明细数据

fields.caption: 大船船名航次
fields.output: 保险申报.大船船名航次

fields.caption: 驳船船名航次
fields.output: 保险申报.驳船船名航次

actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.sid,
       cymx.cyka,
       cymx.mdka,
       cymx.zzka,
       (cmin+"/"+hangci) as cm,
       (zzcmin+"/"+zzhangci) as zcm,
       cymx.dswxzj,
       cymx.tdh,
       cymx.sjcy1,
       cymx.xshj2,
       cymx.ysfs,
       cymx.wfgs
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[保险申报.发票号码]) 
ORDER BY cymx.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 调入投保人信息
actions.caption: 调入投保人信息

fields.caption: 开票税号
fields.output: 保险申报.投保人税务登记号

actions.expression:
SELECT wfgs.sid,wfgs.kpsh,wfgs.ywdz,wfgs.lxdh 
FROM wfgs 
WHERE (wfgs.ywmc=[保险申报.投保人名称]) 
ORDER BY wfgs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 计算-保费
actions.caption: 计算-保费
actions.expression: [保险申报.发票金额]*1.1*[保险申报.费率]

view.params:
select fphm 
  from cymx 
  where (zdry=:_user_username_) 
  and cymx.fphm LIKE CONCAT('%', [保险申报.发票号码], '%')
  and (fksb="是") 
  order by fphm desc

FROM tiananports
ORDER BY tiananports.SID ASC

SELECT tiananports.wfEngPortName
FROM tiananports
ORDER BY tiananports.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="保险运输方式")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC
